LanguageData.Make_BoS_Appalachia_T51_Power_Armor.desc: 用阿巴拉契亚兄弟会阿巴拉契亚颜色涂装 T-51 动力装甲。
LanguageData.Make_BoS_Appalachia_T51_Power_Armor.labe: 涂装T-51动力装甲阿巴拉契亚篇
LanguageData.Make_BoS_Appalachia_T60_Power_Armor.desc: 用阿巴拉契亚兄弟会阿巴拉契亚颜色涂装 T-60 动力装甲。
LanguageData.Make_BoS_Appalachia_T60_Power_Armor.labe: 涂装T-60动力装甲阿巴拉契亚篇
LanguageData.Make_BoS_T45_Lyons_Power_Armor.descripti: Paint a T-45 power armor with Lyons Pride 钢铁兄弟会 colors.
LanguageData.Make_BoS_T45_Lyons_Power_Armor.label: 涂装T-45动力装甲（里昂骄傲）
LanguageData.Make_BoS_T45_Outcast_Power_Armor.descrip: Paint a T-45 power armor with Outcast 钢铁兄弟会 colors.
LanguageData.Make_BoS_T45_Outcast_Power_Armor.label: 涂装 T-45 动力装甲（Outcast）
LanguageData.Make_BoS_T51_Power_Armor.description: 用标准的兄弟会阿巴拉契亚颜色涂装 T-51 动力装甲。
LanguageData.Make_BoS_T51_Power_Armor.label: 涂装T-51动力装甲阿巴拉契亚篇
LanguageData.Make_BoS_T60_Power_Armor.description: 用标准的兄弟会阿巴拉契亚颜色涂装 T-60 动力装甲。
LanguageData.Make_BoS_T60_Power_Armor.label: 涂装T-60动力装甲阿巴拉契亚篇
LanguageData.Make_BoS_Appalachia_T51_Power_Armor_Helm: 将 T51 动力装甲头盔涂成兄弟会阿巴拉契亚章节颜色。
将 T51 头盔涂成阿巴拉契亚颜色。
喷漆 T51 头盔（阿巴拉契亚）
LanguageData.Make_BoS_Appalachia_T60_Power_Armor_Helm: 将 T60 动力装甲头盔涂成兄弟会阿巴拉契亚章节颜色。
将 T60 头盔涂成阿巴拉契亚颜色。
喷漆 T60 头盔（阿巴拉契亚）
LanguageData.Make_BoS_T45_Lyons_Power_Armor_Helmet.de: 将 T45 动力装甲头盔涂成 Lyons Pride Remnants 颜色。
LanguageData.Make_BoS_T45_Lyons_Power_Armor_Helmet.jo: 将 T45 头盔涂成里昂骄傲色。
将 T45 动力装甲头盔涂成兄弟会弃儿颜色。
用 Outcast 颜色涂装 T45 头盔。
LanguageData.Make_BoS_T51_Power_Armor_Helmet.descript: Paint a T51 power armor helmet in standard 钢铁兄弟会 colors.
LanguageData.Make_BoS_T51_Power_Armor_Helmet.jobStrin: 用 BoS 颜色涂装 T51 头盔。
LanguageData.Make_BoS_T51_Power_Armor_Helmet.label: 烤漆T51头盔（BoS标准）
LanguageData.Make_BoS_T60_Power_Armor_Helmet.descript: Paint a T60 power armor helmet in standard 钢铁兄弟会 colors.
LanguageData.Make_BoS_T60_Power_Armor_Helmet.jobStrin: 用 BoS 颜色涂装 T60 头盔。
LanguageData.Make_BoS_T60_Power_Armor_Helmet.label: 烤漆T60头盔（BoS标准）
LanguageData.Make_FCP_Apparel_BoS_Classic_Combat_Armo: Upgrade reinforced combat armor with 钢铁兄弟会 technology and specialized components.
LanguageData.FCP_Extract_Blood.description: 从活人身上提取血液来制作用于输血的血包。捐献者会经历暂时性失血和虚弱。
LanguageData.FCP_Extract_Blood.label: 抽取血液
LanguageData.FCP_Recipe_Make_Enclave_Advanced_Power_A: Craft a suit of 英克雷 Advanced Power Armor using military-grade schematics.
Making 英克雷 Advanced Power Armor.
make 英克雷 Advanced Power Armor
Craft a suit of 英克雷 Advanced Power Armor MkII using military-grade schematics.
Making 英克雷 Advanced Power Armor MkII.
make 英克雷 Advanced Power Armor MkII
Craft an 英克雷 Advanced Power Armor Helmet using military-grade schematics.
Making 英克雷 Advanced Power Armor Helmet.
make 英克雷 Advanced Power Armor Helmet
Craft an 英克雷 Advanced Power Armor MkII Helmet using military-grade schematics.
Making 英克雷 Advanced Power Armor MkII Helmet.
make 英克雷 Advanced Power Armor MkII Helmet
LanguageData.Make_FCP_Apparel_NCR_Salvaged_Power_Armo: 通过拆除伺服电机并用更简单、更易于维护的组件替换先进系统，将 T-45 动力装甲套装转换为 NCR 回收的动力装甲。
将 T-45 装甲改装为 NCR 回收的动力装甲。
将 T-45 装甲改装为 NCR 回收的动力装甲
通过剥离先进组件并添加 NCR 修改，将 T-45 动力装甲头盔转变为 NCR 回收的动力装甲头盔。
将 T-45 头盔改装为 NCR 回收的动力装甲头盔。
将 T-45 头盔改装为 NCR 回收的动力装甲头盔
LanguageData.FCP_Create_Nuka_Ice_Cold.description: Place a bottle of Nuka-Cola Classic into a refreidgerator and turn it into the Ice C老旧 variant.
LanguageData.FCP_Create_Nuka_Ice_Cold.label: make nuka-cola (ice c老旧)
LanguageData.Make_FCP_Apparel_T51_Abraxo_Power_Armor_: 在 T-51 动力装甲头盔上涂上 Abraxo Cleaner 品牌标识。
LanguageData.Make_FCP_Apparel_T51_Hotrod_Flames_Power: 在 T-51 动力装甲头盔上涂上耀眼的火焰贴花。
涂装 T-51 动力装甲头盔（Hotrodder Flame Job）

LanguageData.FCP_Recipe_Make_USA_Secret_Service_Armor: Craft 秘密 Service Armor using classified schematics. Requires positive relations with the United States.
LanguageData.FCP_Recipe_Make_USA_Secret_Service_Helme: Craft a 秘密 Service Helmet using classified schematics. Requires positive relations with the United States.
LanguageData.FCP_Recipe_Make_USA_Secret_Service_Under: Craft 秘密 Service Underarmor using classified schematics. Requires positive relations with the United States.
LanguageData.FCP_Recipe_Make_USA_T65_Power_Armor.desc: Craft a suit of T-65 秘密 Service Power Armor using top-秘密 military schematics. The pinnacle of American power armor technology. Requires excellent relations with the United States.
LanguageData.FCP_Recipe_Make_USA_T65_Power_Armor.jobS: Making T-65 秘密 Service Power Armor.
LanguageData.FCP_Recipe_Make_USA_T65_Power_Armor.labe: make T-65 秘密 Service Power Armor
LanguageData.FCP_Recipe_Make_USA_T65_Power_Armor_Helm: Craft a T-65 秘密 Service Power Armor Helmet using top-秘密 military schematics. The most advanced power armor helmet ever created. Requires excellent relations with the United States.
LanguageData.FCP_Recipe_Paint_USA_Army_T51_Power_Armo: Paint a T-51 power armor in official United States Army colors and insignia. Requires military clearance.
Paint a T-51 power armor helmet in official United States Army colors and insignia. Requires military clearance.
paint T-51 power armor helmet (US Army)
LanguageData.FCP_Recipe_Paint_USA_Army_T60_Power_Armo: Paint a T-60 power armor in official United States Army colors and insignia. The most advanced military power armor paint scheme available. Requires excellent military clearance.
Paint a T-60 power armor helmet in official United States Army colors and insignia. The most advanced military power armor helmet paint scheme available. Requires excellent military clearance.
paint T-60 power armor helmet (US Army)
LanguageData.FCP_Cook_Black_Blood_Sausage.description: Cook black blood sausage from wasteland meat and blood.
LanguageData.FCP_Cook_Black_Blood_Sausage.label: cook black blood sausage
LanguageData.FCP_Cook_Brahmin_Pot_Pie.description: Cook a hearty brahmin pot pie with prime beast meat, tatos, and razorgrain.
LanguageData.FCP_Cook_Brahmin_Pot_Pie.label: cook brahmin pot pie
LanguageData.FCP_Cook_Bug_Mush.description: Grind insects into a protein-rich mush.
LanguageData.FCP_Cook_Bug_Mush.label: cook bug mush
LanguageData.FCP_Cook_Chicken_Noodle_Cup.description: Cook a simple chicken noodle cup with poultry and razorgrain noodles.
LanguageData.FCP_Cook_Chicken_Noodle_Cup.label: cook chicken noodle cup
LanguageData.FCP_Cook_Cook_Cooks_Fiend_Stew.descripti: Cook a spicy, aggressive stew with whatever meat is available and plenty of jalapeños.
LanguageData.FCP_Cook_Cook_Cooks_Fiend_Stew.label: cook cook-cook's fiend stew
LanguageData.FCP_Cook_Crispy_Wings.description: Deep-fry rad chicken wings until crispy and g老旧en.
LanguageData.FCP_Cook_Crispy_Wings.label: cook crispy wings
LanguageData.FCP_Cook_Deathclaw_Steak_And_Eggs.descri: Prepare a premium meal of deathclaw steak with fresh eggs.
LanguageData.FCP_Cook_Deathclaw_Steak_And_Eggs.label: cook deathclaw steak and eggs
Prepare deathclaw steak served with razorgrain.
LanguageData.FCP_Cook_Flea_Soup.description: Boil a thin broth from s商场 creatures and scraps.
LanguageData.FCP_Cook_Flea_Soup.label: cook flea soup
LanguageData.FCP_Cook_Happy_Birthday_Sweet_Roll.descr: Bake a special sweet roll decorated for celebrations. A rare luxury in the wasteland.
LanguageData.FCP_Cook_Happy_Birthday_Sweet_Roll.label: bake happy birthday sweet roll
LanguageData.FCP_Cook_Meat_On_A_Stick.description: Grill simple meat skewers over an open flame.
LanguageData.FCP_Cook_Meat_On_A_Stick.label: cook meat on a stick
LanguageData.FCP_Cook_Noodle_Cup.description: Prepare a basic cup of razorgrain noodles.
LanguageData.FCP_Cook_Noodle_Cup.label: cook noodle cup
LanguageData.FCP_Cook_Prime_Meat_Steak.description: Prepare a well-cooked steak from prime wasteland beast meat.
LanguageData.FCP_Cook_Prime_Meat_Steak.label: cook prime meat steak
LanguageData.FCP_Cook_Prime_Meat_Steak_With_Corn_And_: Prepare a lavish meal of prime steak with grilled maize and roasted tatos.
Cooking prime steak with corn and tatos.
cook prime meat steak with corn and tatos
LanguageData.FCP_Cook_Sausages.description: Grill simple sausages from ground wasteland meat.
LanguageData.FCP_Cook_Sausages.label: cook sausages
LanguageData.FCP_Cook_Skeeto_Spit.description: Grill skeeto meat on a stick. The meat is questionable, but it's edible.
LanguageData.FCP_Cook_Skeeto_Spit.label: cook skeeto spit
LanguageData.FCP_Cook_Sweet_Rolls.description: Bake soft, sweet pastries from razorgrain flour. A beloved treat across the wasteland.
LanguageData.FCP_Cook_Sweet_Rolls.label: bake sweet rolls
